_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of User Agent Strings and the intelligence that can be derived from them
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of agentic AI design patterns, including tool use, multi-agent coordination, memory systems, and the safety and reliability challenges specific to agentic architectures.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.448), SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [agent, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [derived, intelligence, strings, user] vs WIDAI-only terms [agentic, ai, architectures, challenges, coordination, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.876, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of User Agent Strings and the intelligence that can be derived from th" and "Knowledge of agentic AI design patterns, including tool use, multi-agent coordin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.562 ≈ STS 0.566 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [agent, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.1%. Shared tokens: [agent, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [derived, intelligence, strings, user]. WIDAI-only: [agentic, ai, architectures, challenges, coordination, design].
